title: Identify and select plants
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify and select plants demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify commonly used plants

pcs.text: Observe morphological, tactile and sensory characteristics of plant specimens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe morphological, tactile and sensory characteristics of plant specimens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe morphological, tactile and sensory characteristics of plant specimens.

pcs.text: Identify a variety of commonly used plant types in terms of function in the landscape
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify a variety of commonly used plant types in terms of function in the landscape?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify a variety of commonly used plant types in terms of function in the landscape.

pcs.text: Identify commonly used plants to a common name, genus, species and cultivar level
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify commonly used plants to a common name, genus, species and cultivar level?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify commonly used plants to a common name, genus, species and cultivar level.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify commonly used plants

elements.title: Identify plants based on growth and development

pcs.text: Identify basic types, functions and structure of roots, stems, trunks and vascular systems

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify basic types, functions and structure of roots, stems, trunks and vascular systems.

pcs.text: Identify basic types, functions and structure of leaves, buds and meristems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify basic types, functions and structure of leaves, buds and meristems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify basic types, functions and structure of leaves, buds and meristems.

pcs.text: Identify basic types, functions and structure of flowers, fruit and seeds

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify basic types, functions and structure of flowers, fruit and seeds.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify plants based on growth and development

elements.title: Determine plant cultural requirements

pcs.text: Refer to origins and cultural requirements of different plant types

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refer to origins and cultural requirements of different plant types.

pcs.text: Explain growing conditions and their impact on plants and their performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain growing conditions and their impact on plants and their performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain growing conditions and their impact on plants and their performance.

elements.title: Identify and select plants to suit the plant use and work site

pcs.text: Identify site conditions related to plant use
